A long ass caption awaits you...

I talk about:

  • The 13k special

  • Some slightly copied bios and captions

  • And why some WIPs of mine may never be posted

I think this is the only time I've said I was going to do a specific scenario and then actually ended up doing it...

I'm so weirdly obsessed with villian x dynamics rn 😪

I'm also low key really proud of this bot and prompt 😩

Okay, so I said this on my announcements doc but I'll say it again here: I'm sorry y'all but there's going to be a definite delay in the 13k special 😭

I haven't been in the mood to write smut and I feel weirdly burnt out even though I've been posting very consistently? Idk what's going on but hopefully I can get y'all a special at some point, sorry for the delay 😥

moving on,

This is so random but there's a couple creators that I've seen who have "copied" my bio and caption layout and it's kinda weird to see 😭

It's not really that deep since it is just a bio and caption but something I've noticed is that the people who copy those things seem to never interact with me or my profile...which is odd since clearly they are all over it 🤨

I'm not gonna pop a titty over it tho, dw 😍

Tis just an observation. ALSO. A lot of y'all have wanted one of my WIPs "speed bumps" for a whileeee. However, someone else already made it 😭

Now...I don't know if they copied it from my WIP list, but it has the same title and prompt so I have my suspicions 😵‍💫

What makes it even more annoying is that they posted it the day I was planning on posting it, I actually have the dates for proof:

Their bot :

My bot :

(mine is still in the drafts)

(The dates 😵‍💫, mine is made literally the DAY before I was gonna post it and then they posted theirs) My timing is soooo bad 😭

Believe it or not this is not the first time this has happened 😀

I don't wanna be accused of stealing so I fear quite a few of my WIPs will never see the light because of situations like this 😩

I'm really sorry tho, cause I know y'all really want certain WIPs 😥

edit: Currently testing and look at this response 😩😩😩

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
